contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Discussion about utilizing the Meta suit framework for extension to cover digital infrastructure of our DAO ecosystem 
  
  https://github.com/Netswitch-Inc/unity
  
  Surfaced that ESG companies don’t usually have budget or team to handle the cyber security compliance 
  
  This framework when implemented as a one click solution will greatly aid these ESG organizations with their impact by minimizing disruption they might encounter during occasions of cyber security breaches 
  
  Also some of these ESG organizations might require insurance to be able to operate and to do so, their insurance companies might require that they have policies in place pertaining to cyber security and PII 
  
  Ideal solution is either a custom AWS AMD deployed into their cloud cluster or a similar deployed into GCP cluster 
  
  For ESG organizations with on premise perhaps just a MacBook mini deployment hooked up to their local network to start scanning and suggesting policies 
  
  Since a lot of the companies might have sensitive data that does not allow them to make available to the frontier models a Small Language Model like the mistral AI model might be the approach
  
  https://mistral.ai/news/announcing-mistral-7b/
  
  For our codebase implementation to monitor our ecosystem as a version 1 we will consider extending the codebase and then including it as module in cypher defense 
  
  https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense
  
  Thereafter have Sophia utilize it for managing the cyber security aspects of our digital infrastructure 
  
  Family offices are suitable channels to make available these solution build up. A lot of them have websites but their ESG initiatives might not always be visible until face to face discussion
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, Stanley Li
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: None (proof: links in description)
- Destination Contribution File Location: See description (URL(s))
--------

My Digital Signature: 

Request Transaction ID: 

This submission was generated using https://dapp.truesight.me/report_contribution.html

Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
